personal.name: Mostafa Tarek
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.summary: Backend Software Engineer with hands-on experience building scalable RESTful APIs using Java EE, Spring Boot and ASP.NET. Skilled in designing database-driven applications with SQL Databases.

bullets: Developed core frontend features using React, Tailwind CSS, AntD and built RESTful APIs with Java Spring Boot integrated with PostgreSQL in a Dockerized environment for an Engineer Onboarding System.
Delivered user stories on schedule within an Agile team, acting as Scrum Master for a team of 7 leading sprint planning and daily stand-ups.
Contributed to frontend and backend development of a Fleet Management System using ASP.NET.
Completed a Data Visualization program using Power BI, analyzing employee travel patterns and supermarket operations.
Developed a CMS back-end using .NET Core and built Microservices for event logging and automated tasks.
Utilized Git for version control to collaborate effectively with team members.

projects.title: Engineer Onboarding System
projects.description: Contributed to developing an Engineer Onboarding System that streamlines onboarding and progress tracking for new engineers. I worked across the stack using React on the frontend and Java Spring Boot with PostgreSQL in a Dockerized backend environment. The project was managed in an Agile (Scrum) workflow using GitLab for version control, reviews, and sprint tracking.

projects.title: Fleet Management System
projects.description: Worked on a fleet management system across both frontend and backend by designing and managing the database, writing queries, and integrating them into ASP.NET web forms and Microsoft SQL Server

projects.title: CMS with Microservices
projects.description: Content Management System backend using ASP.NET Core with event logging and task automation microservices.

projects.title: Telecom Customer Management Dashboard
projects.description: A full-stack customer management dashboard built for a telecom company. The backend exposes a RESTful API with server-side pagination, contract expiry tracking, and analytics aggregations. The frontend is an Angular SPA featuring a Chart.js dashboard (pie and line charts) and a paginated customer table, themed to Orange Telecom's brand identity.

projects.title: Compiler-Parser
projects.description: A Python-based mini compiler with a graphical interface that processes mathematical expressions through all major compiler phases from lexical analysis to assembly code generation. Supporting both integer and float modes.

projects.title: Autonomus Service Robot
projects.description: Autonomous service robot developed as a graduation project to assist students in the university admission building. Built with ROS 2 and Nav2 for autonomous navigation. It supports multi-modal interaction through NLP-based voice commands and a sign language recognition module using MediaPipe for keypoint extraction and an LSTM model for gesture classification with high accuracy. The project delivers a fully functional robotic assistant combining navigation and intelligent interaction.

achievements.title: IEEE Solve the 17 Hackathon
achievements.description: Developed a web application using Next.js to help illiterate individuals learn Arabic letters and words through a simple user interface and voice commands, contributing to the United Nations’ 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) initiative and earning 2nd place.

achievements.title: WRC @Home Service Robot Challenge
achievements.description: Achieved 3rd place in an international robotics competition focused on autonomous service robots.

achievements.title: RoboCup European Super Teams
achievements.description: Secured 2nd place in the Super Teams category; also awarded Best Technical Description Paper.

courses & certifications: APEX: Empowering Low Code Apps with AI
Java Web Development / JEE / Jakarta EE

education.degree: B.Sc. in Computer Science and Information Technology
